author: ruikurenaii
description: Integrates the osu! Performance Points system to to gamify your note-taking experience!

manifest.author: Louie Kurenai
manifest.description: Integrates the osu! Performance Points system to gamify your note-taking experience!
manifest.name: Performium

name: Performium

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Hotfix Release v1.8.1
`Codename: Mindlink`

This hotfix update changes more on the user interface as they were not updated properly!

Changelog:
- Changed the plugin settings! Now the new system has been included!
- Fixed a bug where calculating with the current performance system doesn't work properly due to the user interface!
releases.name: v1.8.1

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.8.0
`Codename: Lightcore`

Now this is what I call a long update, or is it? This update brings improvements to the performance system with new filtering capabilities and expanded functionality.

Changelog;
- Added and removed some facts to the fun facts collection!
- Implemented the weighted performance points system (just like in the osu! game!) #9 
- Completely rewritten the performance system with newer factors!
- Added a new system, but there won't be a changelog for it!
- Made the top performance command functional (with filtering capabilities of course, I don't want entries with completely empty values!) #10 
- Fixed performance value saving bug and integrated weighted PP usage!
- Added account statistics tracking including experience points (XP)! #3 
- Improved performance value handling with better error prevention! #5
- Various performance and stability improvements across the codebase!

Source code changelog
- Updated dependency packages to the latest to ensure the latest fixes and additions apply!
- Added a quick shell script (only for the source code)
- Added a workflow for daily test performance system builds!
releases.name: v1.8.0

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.7.0
`Codename: Kinetisphere`

Happy hearts day to everyone! This update completely rewrites the performance system, but the calculation may be unstable for now!

Changelog;
- New fun facts have been added
- A new system has been published, but unfortunately there won't be a changelog for it until it's logs are ready for publish.
- New values have been added to the test system.
- Cleaned some various parts of the source code.
- Updated the bash build script.
releases.name: v1.7.0

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.6.3
`Codename: Jumpdrive`

this update fixes a critical bug that caused the calculated values from all systems to output as 0!

Changelog;
- A critical bug has been fixed that caused the calculated values from all systems to output as 0.
- New values have been added to the test system.
- **!! NO SYSTEM HAS BEEN ADDED TO THE PLUGIN !!**
- A fun fact has been added to honor the critical bug that has been fixed.
- Updated the bash build script.
releases.name: v1.6.3

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.6.2
`Codename: Infocloud`

This update fixes some variousl bugs that weren't fixed in the last update!
Changelog:
- Fixed the problem where the dropdown options didn't match
- The current performance system has been reworked with a minor addition, unfortunately, there won't be a changelog.
- Revamped the fun fact section located in the plugin's settings
- Updated `versions.json`
- *Changed the bash script to make it more usable.*
- Added another setting that displays the plugin's current version and it's codename.
- Various features will not be available until further notice.
- Fixed an issue where the plugin cannot be downloaded.
releases.name: v1.6.2

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.6.1
`Codename: Hyperloop`

This awaited update fixes some various graphical bugs that weren't fixed in the last update!
Changelog:
- Fixed the problem where the dropdown options didn't match
- The current performance system has been reworked with a minor addition, refer to the [changelog here](https://ruikurenaii.github.io/performium-pp-changelog/).
- New fun fact lines have been added to the array. Unfortunately, they're more likely to be limited.
- *Added the most useless bash script for users to get the plug-in compiled for themselves.*

- **!! FIXED THE ISSUE WHERE THE PLUGIN'S PAGE AND IT'S INSTALLATION WASN'T AVAILABLE DUE TO THE PLUGIN ID MISMATCH !!**

**!! THE TOP PERFORMANCE COMMAND IS STILL BUGGY, I AM TRYING TO FIX IT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE !!**
releases.name: v1.6.1

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.6.0
`Codename: Gravisphere`

This update brings a ton of reworks that took a very long time to finalize for release!
Changelog:
- Fixed the problem where the dropdown options didn't match
- A rework has been made to the test performance system, refer to the [changelog here](https://ruikurenaii.github.io/performium-pp-changelog/).

**!! THE TOP PERFORMANCE COMMAND IS STILL BUGGY, I AM TRYING TO FIX IT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE !!**
releases.name: v1.6.0

releases.author: ruikurenaii

# Hotfix v1.5.1
`Codename: ???`

This update is a quick hotfix to the plugin and it's required to install to get the changes!

Changelog:
- Fixed the problem where the dropdown options didn't match
- A rework has been made to the test performance system, refer to the [changelog here](https://ruikurenaii.github.io/performium-pp-changelog/).

**!! THE TOP PERFORMANCE COMMAND IS STILL BUGGY, I AM TRYING TO FIX IT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE !!**

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.5.0
`Codename: Fluxgate`

Changelog:
- A new PP system has been added. You can check the changelog by clicking [here](https://ruikurenaii.github.io/performium-pp-changelog). (changes will be added later on)
- Added more facts to spit out
- Added the top performance command (EXPERIMENTAL)
- Fixed the issue where the performance values didn't save properly

**!! NOTE: THE TOP PERFORMANCE COMMANDS IS BUGGY AND NOT RECOMMENDED FOR USE AT THE MOMENT !!**

** !! FOR BETA BUILDS, GO TO THIS REPOSITORY'S ACTIONS TAB AND DOWNLOAD THE LATEST CHANGE TO PREVENT THE VALUES BETWEEN THE TEST AND CURRENT PERFORMANCE SYSTEMS FROM BEING THE SAME !!**
releases.name: v1.5.0

releases.author: ruikurenaii
releases.description:
# Release v1.4.0
`Codename: Exosynth`

Changelog:
- A new PP system has been added. You can check the changelog by clicking [here](https://ruikurenaii.github.io/performium-pp-changelog). (changes will be added later on)
- Added more facts to spit out
- This is the first official release to Obsidian! Releases older than this version are no longer recommended for use.
- Added a function to compare performance points from different pp systems: This can allow you to see the difference without having to do some mathematical stuff in the calculator.
releases.name: v1.4.0
